label: Open Game Workspace
summary: Open a game workspace manifest into Studio as a typed readout before live runtime attach.

fields.name: workspaceRoot
fields.summary: Absolute or workspace-resolved game workspace root selected by the caller.

fields.name: manifestPath
fields.summary: Manifest path inside the workspace root.

fields.name: workspaceVersion
fields.summary: Studio game workspace read model version.

fields.name: workspaceRoot
fields.summary: Opened game workspace root.

fields.name: manifestPath
fields.summary: Manifest path inside the workspace root.

fields.name: gameId
fields.summary: Stable game identity read from the workspace adapter metadata.

fields.name: engineVersion
fields.summary: Required ASHA engine compatibility version from the manifest.

fields.name: contractsVersion
fields.summary: Required ASHA contracts compatibility version from the manifest.

fields.name: runtimeBridgeVersion
fields.summary: Required runtime bridge compatibility version from the manifest.

fields.name: devtoolsProtocolVersion
fields.summary: Required devtools protocol compatibility version from the manifest.

fields.name: sceneRoots
fields.summary: Scene root directories declared by the manifest.

fields.name: assetRoots
fields.summary: Asset root directories declared by the manifest.

fields.name: catalogPackages
fields.summary: Catalog package directories declared by the manifest.

fields.name: policyPackages
fields.summary: Policy package directories declared by the manifest.

fields.name: attachEndpoint
fields.summary: Local devtools websocket endpoint declared by the manifest.

fields.name: devCommand
fields.summary: Development runtime command declared by the manifest.

fields.name: publishCommand
fields.summary: Publish command declared by the manifest.

fields.name: workspaceHash
fields.summary: Deterministic readout hash for the parsed workspace manifest.

guiMirror.argumentSummary: GameWorkspaceManifestInput: workspaceRoot: Absolute or workspace-resolved game workspace root selected by the caller. manifestPath: Manifest path inside the workspace root.
guiMirror.resultSummary: GameWorkspaceOpenOutput: workspaceVersion: Studio game workspace read model version. workspaceRoot: Opened game workspace root. manifestPath: Manifest path inside the workspace root. gameId: Stable game identity read from the workspace adapter metadata. engineVersion: Required ASHA engine compatibility version from the manifest. contractsVersion: Required ASHA contracts compatibility version from the manifest. runtimeBridgeVersion: Required runtime bridge compatibility version from the manifest. devtoolsProtocolVersion: Required devtools protocol compatibility version from the manifest. sceneRoots: Scene root directories declared by the manifest. assetRoots: Asset root directories declared by the manifest. catalogPackages: Catalog package directories declared by the manifest. policyPackages: Policy package directories declared by the manifest. attachEndpoint: Local devtools websocket endpoint declared by the manifest. devCommand: Development runtime command declared by the manifest. publishCommand: Publish command declared by the manifest. workspaceHash: Deterministic readout hash for the parsed workspace manifest.
guiMirror.artifactSummary: game_workspace: Parsed game workspace readout with compatibility, roots, commands, and attach endpoint.

undo.reason: Read-only or diagnostic command has no mutation to reverse.

artifacts.summary: Parsed game workspace readout with compatibility, roots, commands, and attach endpoint.

fields.name: diagnostics
code

fields.name: source

fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.summary: Generated public static mesh asset descriptor to preview.

fields.name: materialId
fields.summary: Catalog material id to highlight in the preview.

fields.summary: Generated public retained-mode render diff preview evidence.

fields.summary: Whether evidence is reference preview or runtime readback.

fields.summary: Typed diagnostic strings for unavailable/degraded support.

guiMirror.artifactSummary: model_metadata: Static mesh preview metadata. material_metadata: Material projection metadata. render_diff_preview: Retained-mode render diff preview evidence.

idempotency.condition: Same model asset, material id, and catalog versions produce the same preview diff.

knownLimitations: Preview evidence is render-diff/readback metadata only; screenshots, hardware GPU, and performance evidence are out of scope.

label: Plan Voxel Conversion
summary: Request a deterministic Rust-owned voxel conversion plan for a supported static mesh source.

fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.name: request
fields.summary: Generated public voxel-conversion plan request.

fields.name: plan
fields.summary: Generated public voxel-conversion plan with diagnostics and evidence refs.

guiMirror.artifactSummary: voxel_conversion_plan: Plan id, hashes, output estimate, diagnostics, and evidence refs.

undo.reason: Read-only or diagnostic command has no mutation to reverse.

idempotency.condition: Safe when source hash, settings hash, and target authority snapshot are unchanged.

knownLimitations: RuntimeSessionFacade may fail closed with operation_unimplemented until voxel conversion backend wiring lands.

diagnostics.message: Native voxel conversion backend may fail closed until wired.

label: Preview Voxel Conversion
summary: Preview bounded conversion output from a previously planned voxel conversion without mutating authority.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.name: request
fields.summary: Generated public voxel-conversion preview request.

undo.reason: Read-only or diagnostic command has no mutation to reverse.

idempotency.condition: Safe when plan id and expected plan hash still match authority state.

artifacts.summary: Output hash, sampled voxels, bounds, diagnostics, and evidence refs.

knownLimitations: Preview is Rust/runtime readback metadata; Studio must not voxelize meshes locally or use renderer buffers as authority.

label: Apply Voxel Conversion
summary: Apply a planned voxel conversion through RuntimeSession authority with receipt and replay-oriented hashes.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.name: request
fields.summary: Generated public voxel-conversion apply request.

guiMirror.artifactSummary: voxel_conversion_receipt: Apply receipt with accepted output hash/count, diagnostics, and evidence refs.

undo.reason: Conversion apply must be reversed by an explicit future authority command or snapshot restore, not registry-local metadata.

idempotency.condition: Safe only when expected plan/preview hashes still match and the conversion has not already committed.

artifacts.summary: Apply receipt with accepted output hash/count, diagnostics, and evidence refs.

knownLimitations: RuntimeSessionFacade may fail closed with operation_unimplemented until voxel conversion backend wiring lands.

label: Load Asset Into Scene

fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.summary: Public catalog static-mesh asset id to load into the scene.

fields.summary: Catalog material id to bind to the placed instance.

fields.name: placement
translation
fields.summary: World translation x, y, z.

fields.name: rotation
fields.summary: Rotation quaternion x, y, z, w.

fields.name: scale
fields.summary: Scale x, y, z.
Scene placement transform for the loaded asset.

fields.name: assetId
fields.summary: Loaded catalog asset id.

fields.name: renderableIds
fields.summary: Named renderable ids created for the placed asset.

fields.name: loadDiff
fields.summary: Generated public retained-mode render diff that defines and places the asset.

fields.name: rendererClassification
fields.summary: Whether evidence is reference placement or runtime readback.

fields.name: diagnostics
fields.summary: Typed diagnostic strings for unavailable/degraded support.

guiMirror.argumentSummary: LoadSceneAssetInput: sessionId: Stable studio session identifier. assetId: Public catalog static-mesh asset id to load into the scene. materialId: Catalog material id to bind to the placed instance. placement: Scene placement transform for the loaded asset.
guiMirror.resultSummary: LoadSceneAssetOutput: assetId: Loaded catalog asset id. renderableIds: Named renderable ids created for the placed asset. loadDiff: Generated public retained-mode render diff that defines and places the asset. rendererClassification: Whether evidence is reference placement or runtime readback. diagnostics: Typed diagnostic strings for unavailable/degraded support.
guiMirror.artifactSummary: model_metadata: Loaded static mesh asset metadata. material_metadata: Bound material projection metadata. render_diff_preview: Retained-mode render diff that defines and places the loaded asset.

idempotency.condition: Same asset id, material id, placement, and catalog versions produce the same load diff.

artifacts.summary: Retained-mode render diff that defines and places the loaded asset.

knownLimitations: Load evidence is render-diff/readback metadata only; screenshots, hardware GPU, and performance evidence are out of scope.
Asset placement is browser/reference projection; Rust/WASM authority placement remains deferred until the runtime bridge is approved.

label: Translate Entity
summary: Translate the selected entity along a single world axis from the viewport transform gizmo through an editor-local typed command, recording preview and apply modes on the shared timeline.

fields.name: sessionId
fields.summary: Stable studio session identifier.

fields.name: entityId
fields.summary: Entity/renderable id of the currently selected entity to translate.

fields.name: axis
fields.summary: Single world axis the gizmo translates along.

fields.name: delta
fields.summary: Signed translation delta applied along the chosen axis.

fields.name: mode
fields.summary: Whether this is an editor-local preview drag or the committed apply.

fields.name: entityId
fields.summary: Selected entity id echoed back.

fields.name: renderableId
fields.summary: Viewport renderable id the translated entity is synced to.

fields.name: axis
fields.summary: Axis the translate was applied along.

fields.name: delta
fields.summary: Signed translation delta applied along the axis.

fields.name: mode
fields.summary: Preview drag or committed apply.

fields.name: translationBefore
fields.summary: Entity world translation x, y, z before the edit.

fields.name: translationAfter
fields.summary: Entity world translation x, y, z after the edit.

fields.name: transformHash
fields.summary: Editor transform evidence hash.

fields.name: applied
fields.summary: Whether the editor-local translate was committed (apply) versus preview.

guiMirror.argumentSummary: TranslateEntityInput: sessionId: Stable studio session identifier. entityId: Entity/renderable id of the currently selected entity to translate. axis: Single world axis the gizmo translates along. delta: Signed translation delta applied along the chosen axis. mode: Whether this is an editor-local preview drag or the committed apply.
guiMirror.resultSummary: TranslateEntityOutput: entityId: Selected entity id echoed back. renderableId: Viewport renderable id the translated entity is synced to. axis: Axis the translate was applied along. delta: Signed translation delta applied along the axis. mode: Preview drag or committed apply. translationBefore: Entity world translation x, y, z before the edit. translationAfter: Entity world translation x, y, z after the edit. transformHash: Editor transform evidence hash. applied: Whether the editor-local translate was committed (apply) versus preview.
guiMirror.artifactSummary: editor_state: Editor-local selected-entity transform translate evidence.

idempotency.condition: Translating the same entity id along the same axis by the same delta and mode with the same scene readback yields the same transform.

knownLimitations: Translate is an editor-local transform over public scene-view readback; it does not claim physics, native runtime, or performance evidence, and authoritative/runtime transform mutation remains deferred until the runtime bridge is approved.
